description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> chance to reduce the target's <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>的几率使目标的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

name.jp: 撮影現場の招かざる客

description.en: (Triggered Effect) When a skill used on the caster's turn scores a critical hit, activates <color=#28d9ed>Intruder on Set</color> as an extra attack.\n\n<color=#28d9ed>Intruder on Set</color>: Attacks all enemies. Reduces <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the target by <color=#28d9ed>20%</color> and grants increased <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> to the caster for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: (発動効果)自分のターンにスキル使用時、会心が発生した場合、追加で<color=#28d9ed>【撮影現場の招かざる客】</color>を発動する。\n\n<color=#28d9ed>【撮影現場の招かざる客】</color>:敵全体にダメージを与える。対象の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>を<color=#28d9ed>-20%</color>DOWNさせ、自分の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.kr: (발동 효과) 자신의 턴에 사용하는 스킬이 치명 공격으로 적중하면, 추가타로 <color=#28d9ed>촬영장의 불청객</color>을 발동합니다. \n\n<color=#28d9ed>촬영장의 불청객</color> : 적 전체를 공격합니다. 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>-20%</color> 감소시키고 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: (触发效果)自身回合使用的技能以暴击命中时,则额外发动技能<color=#28d9ed>拍摄现场的不速之客</color>。\n\n<color=#28d9ed>拍摄现场的不速之客</color>:攻击全体敌人。使目标的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>降低<color=#28d9ed>-20%</color>,并使自身的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies. Has a <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> chance to inflict reduced <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> on all enemies for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>, and grants the caster increased <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>の確率で敵全体の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間DOWNさせ、自分の<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격합니다. <color=#28d9ed>70%</color> 확률로 적 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 감소시키고, <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color>을 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人。有<color=#28d9ed>70%</color>的几率使全体敌人的<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>,并使自身<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。
